title: Welcome to the MeowVault!
subtitle: Learn JavaScript and have fun!
register: Please, log in before choosing a game.

description.first: MeowVault is a system helping students to prepare for their FrontEnd interviews. It consists of funny games, playing which helps them practice their skills in a fun and engaging way.
description.second: MeowVault is a soft and comfortable way to learn, as soft as a cat's paws which is the symbol of our project. We believe that learning should be enjoyable and stress-free, just like the gentle touch of a cat's paws.
description.third: So, get ready to have fun while sharpening your FrontEnd skills with MeowVault!

gameDescription.decrypto: Decrypto is a funny game where the player must investigate the mystical case and find a hidden word.
gameDescription.hangman: Hangman is a dramatic game where you have just several tries to guess a word.
gameDescription.mergegame: Merge-Game is an amazing experience where the player have to merge question and answer cards
gameDescription.cities: Cities is an interesting journey where the player opens new locations on the map
gameDescription.loopgame: Meow-Loop is an emotional game with a timer. Guess more words in one minute!
gameDescription.diaries: Development is magic. We all wrote our development diaries for many weeks.
